Hold fast to the wisdom of ancient beings, for the strength of the earth lies in the shadows of the realm. Within the walls of old, magic sleeps, yet it awakens beneath the watchful gaze of the unseen. Seek refuge in the halls of wisdom, where the whispers of the past guide the righteous.
